history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell to the right (row 02 column C) is lava (`L`), which I must avoid. I should turn downwards (`v`) to move safely towards the goal located at row 04 column D. To face down from right, I will turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing downwards (`v`) at row 02 column B. The cell below (row 03 column B) is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward towards the goal on row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell below (row 04 column B) is floor (`.`), so I can safely move forward towards the goal. However, the goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to keep moving down then turn right later.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The cell below (row 05 column B) is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 04 column D, I need to turn right to face right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left (`<`). To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to face right (`>`). I can turn around by turning right twice or left twice. Turning left twice is as efficient as turning right twice, so next I will turn left to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). To get to the goal at row 04 column D, I need to face right (`>`). I will turn right next, which will turn me from facing down to facing right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B and currently facing left (`<`). I want to face right (`>`) to move towards the goal at row 04 column D. I will turn right twice to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B and facing up (`^`). To face right (`>`), I will turn right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front of me at row 04 column C is lava (`L`), which is deadly, so moving forward is not safe. I should find another way to reach the goal at row 04 column D. If I turn left, I will face up (`^`). I will check moving upwards cell at row 03 column B, which is floor (`.`) and safe. I will move forward there first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Now facing up (`^`) at row 04 column B. The cell in front at row 03 column B is floor (`.`) and safe. I will move forward to row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
Now at row 03 column B facing up (`^`). The cell in front at row 02 column B is floor (`.`) and safe. Moving forward there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D, which is located two rows down and two columns to the right. I will move forward to row 02 column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
Now at row 02 column B facing up (`^`). The cell ahead at row 01 column B is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. The goal is to the right at row 04 column D. To reach the goal, I need to turn right to face right (`>`), then move forward to column C, avoiding lava at cell C2. However, C2 is lava, so moving directly right from current row is risky. I should backtrack or find a safer path. Instead, I will turn right to face right and check next steps.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Currently at row 02, column B facing right (`>`). The cell ahead at row 02, column C contains lava (`L`), so moving forward is dangerous. I need to find another path to reach the goal at row 04, column D. I can turn right to face down (`v`) and then move forward into row 03, column B which is floor (`.`) and safe.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now facing down (`v`) at row 02, column B. The cell ahead at row 03, column B is floor (`.`), so it's safe to move forward. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
Now at row 03, column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 04, column B is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward to continue approaching the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
